name: shroodle
flavor_texts: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.
To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.
text: Shroodle is the Toxic Mouse Pokémon. It is a poison and normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: unburden, pickpocket, prankster (hidden). Base stats — HP: 40, Attack: 65, Defense: 35, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 35, Speed: 75. Evolution line: shroodle → grafaiai. Lore: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire. To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.
